verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When all the world Is so empty and untrue, Let me just stay here with You; I want to be where My spirit could fly free, And soar the heavens with You.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: You give me comfort Like no one else could; In Your Presence, I find rest; When no one else Seems to care about me, Your loving hands Keep touching me.

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: When trouble comes, Open up the gates of Love, Lord, take me in; Fill my life with strength within, Let me linger in Your arms; Guide me gently As I walk from day to day.

verse.name: V4
